30.reason: This prints the '-' character when expansion conditions are not met, but the original '-' character was already skipped in the loop. This causes extra '-' to appear. The correct approach is to print '-' only when it should be kept, but here the logic is flawed.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.25 , reason:  This prints the '-' character when expansion conditions are not met, but the original '-' character was already skipped in the loop. This causes extra '-' to appear. The correct approach is to print '-' only when it should be kept, but here the logic is flawed.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.25 , reason:  This prints the '-' character when expansion conditions are not met, but the problem requires outputting the original '-' unchanged. However, the logic here is flawed because it prints '-' even when the '-' should be part of the original string (e.g., in "a-uB-F", the second '-' should be printed as is, but this code prints it only in the else branch, which may cause missing or extra characters). The correct approach is to print the '-' when no expansion occurs, but the current structure may skip printing the character before the '-' in some cases.
